sizing_rule.note: Reduce optimal f toward zero as lower bound of return distribution extends further negative. Primary trigger: when P(return < 0) > 50% or mathematical expectation < 0. optimal_f approaches zero under these conditions to manage tail risk.

source_rule_text: Reduce optimal f toward zero as the distribution's lower bound extends further negative, particularly when more than 50% of the probability distribution area falls below zero (negative mathematical expectation).
